TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Austin_Cen, title = Austin_Cen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Austin_Cen} }

S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox person Austin Cen (lalu na theluw: Ś•ßśĖĮšłĀ; ťô≥ťüčÁŅį; ryax sa 14 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1988 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. taywan hintgan. msqutux ka Titan(ś≥įŚĚ¶TITAN). lplpyung tay Daswesengreme mqyanux, lalu ga Áöášłä.

panmwo:Infobox person Austin Cen (lalu na theluw: Ś•ßśĖĮšłĀ; ťô≥ťüčÁŅį; ryax sa 14 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1988 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. taywan hintgan. msqutux ka Titan(ś≥įŚĚ¶TITAN). lplpyung tay Daswesengreme mqyanux, lalu ga Áöášłä.
